message:
Running command: # The ipm wrapper has literal \n in shebang line — create a working wrapper
cat > /tmp/ipm_fixed.sh << 'WRAPPER'
#!/bin/bash
PYTHONPATH=/nc/apps/ipm exec /nc/apps/ipm/bin/ipm "$@"
WRAPPER
chmod +x /tmp/ipm_fixed.sh
/tmp/ipm_fixed.sh --version 2>&1 || true
